title: Fig. 1 in Two parthenogenetic millipede species/lines of the genus Poratia Cook & Cook, 1894 (Diplopoda, Polydesmida, Pyrgodesmidae) found free from Wolbachia bacteria
author: Witzel, K.-P.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Agarose gel picture showing the results of PCR analysis of Poratia DNA using primers specific to the wsp gene of Wolbachia, but with traces of a band of the same molecular weight (ca 600 pairs of nucleotides) as in Wolbachia.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Agarose gel picture showing the results of PCR analysis of Poratia DNA using primers specific to the wsp gene of Wolbachia, but with traces of a band of the same molecular weight (ca 600 pairs of nucleotides) as in Wolbachia.
